title: Additional Steps
description: Adds a few additional steps to the progression of minecraft
body:
About

This mod/datapack adds a few more progression "Points" to enhance your playthrough.

A Quick Summary of the Features

### Materials: -
Rosegold ![Rosegold Toolset](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CFuxUczF/images/0284c316c6b2b4c622118862726423c0955f0217.png)
### Rosegold is an Upgrade of the golden toolset
![Rosegold Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CFuxUczF/images/fd633ae04540a5bc8a65a19c3acee49a5fcd7fdf.png)
These tools have enhanced durability and built-in Fortune/Looting III.
Great for large excavation in the early game!
-
Prismarine Infused ![Prismarine Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CFuxUczF/images/faa4cf2a97220f497560aa26008d7a219a0ee530.png)
### Prismarine Infusion is a slight upgrade to some iron tools (the Sword and Pickaxe)
![Prismarine Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CFuxUczF/images/36a0cf186f41cde86b88dd8a1536213a3e98fb54.png)
This improves their durability, damage (sword) and efficiency (pickaxe).
Great for if you dont yet have enough diamonds for a sword but want an upgrade.
### Lootbags: -
Elder Guardian ![EG lootbag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CFuxUczF/images/3899fab3fcea8d06fafa9fdf85ba3d56f6e41c13.png)
Drops after defeating the Elder Guardian for the first time and contains: - Main: - Diamond Chestplate Trimmed - 100% (1) - Other: - Golden Carrot - Common (1 - 5) - Potion of Healing II - Uncommon (1) - Potion of Speed - Uncommon (1) - Potion of Regeneration - Rare (1)
-
Wither ![W Lootbag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CFuxUczF/images/d33771bb3f6de104403d02797d99067b8d0e2f00.png)
Drops after defeating the Wither for the first time and contains: - Main: - Enchanted Netherite Sword - Common (1) - Enchanted Netherite Pickaxe - Common (1) - Enchanted Netherite Axe - Common (1) - Enchanted Netherite Chestplate - Uncommon (1) - Other: - Wither Rose - Common (1) - Coal Block - Common (1 - 3) - Soul Sand - Uncommon (1 - 3) - Soul Soil - Uncommon (1 - 3)
-
Ender Dragon ![ED Lootbag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CFuxUczF/images/e259757e7e962ffde477d1eeda00be6400a58773.png)
Drops after defeating the Ender Dragon for the first time and contains: - Main: - Dragon Infused (+ Efficiency + DMG): - Diamond Sword - Common (1) - Diamond Axe - Common (1) - Other: - Golden Apple - Common (1) - Ender Chest - Uncommon (2)
### WARNING Only **ONE** lootbag can be opened **per player** so be careful.

Thanks For Checking Out My Mod/Datapack!


If you have any requests/ideas/questions for/about the mod/datapack then DM me on discord
>>"mc_marmaj"<<

and if you like what you see here then check out some of my other projects:
